variants: Residing now in Kelptide Crossing, Huixin Zhang has carved a niche for herself in the marketing world at Gravity Scribe Marketing. She was born in Copperhill Bluffs, which served as the backdrop for her formative years. Huixin is a graduate of Thistledew Academy, where her affinity for languages flourished. At her workplace, she utilizes Esperanto constructed as her professional language, skillfully merging her linguistic expertise with innovative marketing strategies.
